nasb.text: And to man He said, ‘Behold, the fear of the Lord, that is wisdom; And to depart from evil is understanding.’ ”

esv.text: And he said to man, ‘Behold, the fear of the Lord, that is wisdom, and to turn away from evil is understanding.’”

cnv.text: 他對人說：‘敬畏主就是智慧， 遠離邪惡就是聰明。’”

ccb.text: 祂对世人说，‘敬畏主就是智慧， 远离恶便是聪明。’”
